spans.content: Position Description: The Benefits and Human Resources Specialist will work closely with the Human Resource Director and Accountant on
highly confidential projects and must therefore be committed to maintaining the integrity of the Human Resource Department at Peak to Peak.
This individual will work directly with the Peak to Peak staff including support staff, teachers, and administrators. It is therefore vital that the
individual in this position have a demonstrated ability to establish and maintain positive and effective working relationships with all levels of school
staff and administrators. The Benefits Specialist is responsible for carrying out the benefits duties for the school with the utmost level of
confidentiality. This position reports to the Human Resource Director.
STANDARDS-BASED SCORING GUIDELINES

spans.html:
(4): InnovatingInnovation and leadership are taking place on a consistent basis throughout the year within the job description elements;performance and actions impact various stakeholders in the school community; in-depth reflection and data collection areevident as best practices in year-long growth and implemented innovation
(3): ApplyingMeets standards; performs duty or task efficiently and responsibly; fulfilling requirements, executing a list of suggested skillsand/or tasks, and applying best practices; few, if any, problems exist
(2): DevelopingMeets some standards, but not all; errors may be made consistently; development is in progress
(1): NeedingImprovementDoes not meet standards; improvement is needed

spans.content: EMPLOYEE BENEFITS/HR SPECIALIST EVALUATION
I. BENEFITS ADMINISTRATION: STAFF
Job Description Elements:
Standard: Serve as the benefits expert for Peak to Peak, providing accurate and effective employee benefit coordination for staff
● Coordinate and distribute materials for benefit orientations, open enrollment and other applicable employee benefit sessions
● Keep staff abreast of all benefit informational sessions (held both at
\mathsf { P 2 P }
and BVSD) and open enrollment periods
● Assist staff with benefit renewal processes, providing guidance and expertise as appropriate
● Initiate all benefit related paperwork and arrange for completion and submission ensuring deadlines are met
● Ensure all BVSD medical and dental benefit changes and paperwork are provided to BVSD on time and accurately
● Conduct staff benefit meetings and lead benefit task force groups as needed
● Serve as primary contact for all staff benefit inquiries and complaints to ensure prompt, equitable and courteous assistance
● Manage all short-term and long-term disability claims, ensuring all required paperwork is accurately submitted and salaries are calculated and managed
according to plan design
● Work closely with HR Director on all FMLA cases
● Support employees with workers compensation claims, ensuring timely and accurate notification to worker’s compensation insurance carrier, employee
claim processing, and return to work accommodations and adjustments as needed
PROFESSIONAL GROWTH GOALS DURING THIS EVALUATION PERIOD (completed by employee and supervisor):
Please develop measurable goals targeting Peak to Peak’s strategic plan goals, human resource goals, and/or your own professional
development needs. Describe what measures) you will use at the end of the year to determine if you have met each goal. All goals must be
SMART (Specific, Measurable, Attainable, Relevant and Time-bound).
ACHIEVEMENTS, ACCOMPLISHMENTS, AND REFLECTIONS (completed by employee; include evidence):
PEAK TO PEAK
CHARTERSCHOOL

II. BENEFITS ADMINISTRATION: ORGANIZATION
Job Description Elements:
Standard: Stay abreast of employer benefit related local and national legislative changes impacting the organization to accurately and effectively
coordinate employee benefits for the organization
● Maintain current knowledge of state and federal legislative updates that impact the organization (i.e. annual maximum Flex contributions, retirement
contribution limits, taxable fringe benefit, Healthcare Reform, etc.)
● Analyze benefit options and plans, including but not limited to reviewing benefit plan design, cost, renewal and ROI to report to Human Resources Director
● Coordinate human resource procedures to initiate benefits including PERA, disability, life, health insurance and retirement plans, etc.
● Manage and carryout daily benefit processing such as COBRA, terminations, changes, beneficiaries, disability, accident and death claims, retirement plan
rollovers
● Collect and provide census information for all benefit plans (dental, life, AD&D, STD, LTD, PERA, COBRA, Section 125, retirement plans)
● Conduct non-discrimination testing on Section 125 plan annually
● As needed, assist Accounts Payable/Payroll Specialist with monthly reports to be uploaded to retirement plan sites and complete ACH transfers for PERA,
PERA 401(k), PERA 457, AXA 403(b)
● Ensure receipt and processing of benefit premium payments from staff out on FMLA, short- and long-term disability
● Work closely with accountant and Accounts Payable/Payroll Specialist on necessary reporting for all group insurance policies and maintain statistical data
relative to premiums, claims and costs
● Maintain legally compliant employee benefit files in accordance with school HR practices
● Initiate monthly payment check requests for benefit invoices, provide accurate GL coding of premiums for accounting system import
● Review and reconcile monthly benefit premium statements and invoices ensuring that accurate monthly liabilities are reported to accountant
PROFESSIONAL GROWTH GOALS DURING THIS EVALUATION PERIOD (completed by employee and supervisor):
Please develop measurable goals targeting Peak to Peak’s strategic plan goals, human resource goals, and/or your own professional
development needs. Describe what measures) you will use at the end of the year to determine if you have met each goal. All goals must be
SMART (Specific, Measurable, Attainable, Relevant and Time-bound).
PEAK TO PEAK
CHARTERSCHOOL
EMPLOYEE BENEFITS/HR SPECIALIST EVALUATION

spans.content: EMPLOYEE BENEFITS/HR SPECIALIST EVALUATION
III. BENEFIT RELATED PAYROLL ADMINISTRATION
Job Description Elements:
Standard: Ensure timely and accurate benefit related payroll entries and reporting
● Compile and maintain all benefit-related payroll deductions for monthly payroll processing
● Enter all benefit premium deduction changes into Paycom at the start of each FY and each month thereafter prior to payroll processing
Assist Accounts Payable/Payroll Specialist and Human Resources Director with monthly payroll process as needed (year-end W-2 processing, monthly
PERA reporting, health care reform reporting, etc.)
● Maintain payroll systems to achieve alignment with HR benefits and other related payroll deductions to ensure effective accounting support
● Maintain benefit provider payroll web interface and ensure EDI carrier connections are accurate
● Accurately compile and provide monthly reports to the accountant, human resource director, and district staff for benefit payroll liabilities (i.e. benefit
deductions, PERA contributions, 401(k) and 403(b) contributions, FSA deductions, etc.)
● Assist in preparation of compensation plan and other reports with Human Resource Director’s direct supervision
● Assist Human Resource Director with yearly employment offer process
● Assist Human Resource Director with completion of verification of employment requests
PROFESSIONAL GROWTH GOALS DURING THIS EVALUATION PERIOD (completed by employee and supervisor):
Please develop measurable goals targeting Peak to Peak’s strategic plan goals, human resource goals, and/or your own professional
development needs. Describe what measures) you will use at the end of the year to determine if you have met each goal. All goals must be
SMART (Specific, Measurable, Attainable, Relevant and Time-Bound).
ACHIEVEMENTS, ACCOMPLISHMENTS AND REFLECTIONS (completed by employee; include evidence):
PEAK TO PEAK
CHARTERSCHOOL

IV. TEAM RELATIONS / COMMUNICATION & PROFESSIONAL RESPONSIBILITIES
Job Description Elements:
Standard: Maintains positive team relations and effective communication with all constituents.
● Maintains positive and effective working relationships with students, parents, school staff and administrators
● Able to effectively solve problems through a positive, collaborative approach
● Promotes a collegial and collaborative environment with all staff
● Upholds Peak to Peak's communication philosophy, pathways, policies and procedures in following appropriate lines of communication with supervisors and
staff
Seeks feedback on job related issues, techniques and strategies
● Displays appropriate interpersonal skills and strong conflict management skills
● Communicates support for P2P’s mission and vision to the school community
● Communicates effectively with team members and supervisor, whether verbally or in written form
● Effectively follows verbal and/or written instructions
Standard: Benefits Specialist is committed to continuous professional growth and display of professionalism
● Seeks professional development opportunities as appropriate
● Exhibits professional attitudes towards students, staff and community members; projects professional image in communication and appearance
● Makes responsible decisions and takes appropriate actions
● Fulfills assigned duties and responsibilities
● Displays punctuality and consistency in reporting to work and meeting deadlines
● Responds to administrative directives; carries out other duties as assigned
Models care with materials, equipment and facilities
● Models good character
● Seeks out assistance before experiencing crisis
● Seeks balance in workload; establishes appropriate boundaries
PROFESSIONAL GROWTH GOALS DURING THIS EVALUATION PERIOD (completed by employee and supervisor):
Please develop measurable goals targeting Peak to Peak’s strategic plan goals, human resource goals, and/or your own professional
development needs. Describe what measure(s) you will use at the end of the year to determine if you have met each goal. All goals must be
